message:
🐛 Fix skeleton display for stats, clusters, and demo cards when agent offline (#490)

* 🐛 Fix skeleton display for stats, clusters, and demo cards when agent offline

- StatsOverview (unified): Show skeleton when agent offline + demo mode OFF
- Clusters StatsOverview: Add same agent offline skeleton logic
- Clusters page: Show full skeleton view when agent offline + demo mode OFF
- Workloads page: Show skeleton for Clusters Overview section when offline
- CardWrapper: Demo data cards now NEVER show skeleton (they always have data)
- cardRegistry: Add all arcade games to DEMO_EXEMPT_CARDS (21 total games)

This ensures consistent behavior across all dashboards when the agent
is not connected and demo mode is disabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix Security dashboard showing data when agent offline

- Add useLocalAgent hook to check agent connection status
- Add forceSkeletonForOffline flag when agent offline + demo mode OFF
- Show skeleton content for Quick Stats, Charts, and Lists when offline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix Clusters page missing card sections in skeleton view

- Add Dashboard Cards skeleton section when agent offline
- Add Cluster Cards section header to skeleton view
- Ensures UI structure is consistent between offline skeleton and online view

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix MissionSuggestions showing data when agent offline

- Add useLocalAgent and useDemoMode hooks
- Show skeleton action buttons when agent offline + demo mode OFF
- Ensures consistent offline behavior across all dashboard components

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix offline mode skeleton and demo data issues

- Fix KubeCraft localStorage validation to prevent crash from corrupted
  world data (validates GRID_SIZE dimensions and cell structure)
- Refactor Clusters page to maintain consistent layout in offline mode
  with skeleton placeholders instead of early-return skeleton layout
- Rename "Cluster Cards" → "Cluster Info Cards" and
  "Dashboard Cards" → "Cluster Dashboard Cards"
- Mark GitOps page as demo data with visual indicators

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix modal scroll leaking and add smooth scrolling

Add overscroll-contain to prevent scroll events from propagating to
the window behind the modal when reaching scroll boundaries. Also add
scroll-smooth for better scrolling experience in modals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix modal scroll leaking and dropdown category headers

- Add overscroll-contain to modal backdrop to prevent scroll leaking
- Add onWheel stopPropagation to modal container for complete isolation
- Remove sticky category headers from dashboard dropdown (was blocking content)
- Add overscroll-contain to dashboard dropdown list

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Replace dropdown with inline checklist in Sidebar Customizer

Replace the problematic dropdown-based dashboard selector with an inline
checklist UI. The dropdown had scrollbar issues on macOS where the thumb
didn't update during scrolling due to browser rendering bugs with overlay
scrollbars in positioned containers.

The new inline checklist:
- Shows all dashboards grouped by category directly in the form
- Uses the modal's native scroll instead of nested scrolling
- Has a filter input for searching dashboards
- Shows "Added" badges for items already in sidebar
- Includes "Select All" per category

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
